## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Checklist

- [ ] Public API changes are intentional and documented.
- [ ] Tests were added or updated where appropriate.
- [ ] `dotnet build PayVelix.sln -c Release` passes.
- [ ] `dotnet test PayVelix.sln -c Release` passes.
- [ ] No API keys, secrets, or local config files were committed.
